subcodes.first_line: Blessed art thou, O thou who journeyest unto God, who emigrateth unto Him, and who turneth thy face toward His countenance, by His exalted Word [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی لک یا ایها السالک الی الله و المهاجر الیه و المتوجه الی وجهه بقوله تعالی
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @love of God, @martyrs and martyrdom, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @suffering and imprisonment
